THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, WILBUR E THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLUMBUS AVE, #207, S.F. $3,539.95 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,539.95, STAYED UNTIL MAY-01-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 9AM. DEFT TO MAKE A $95- RENT PAYMENT BY 4/16/98 AND 4/23/98 NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS INC 1542CC. IF DEFT COMPLIES DEFT ENTITLED TO SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT OR VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISM W/PREJUDICE. SEE JUDGMENT.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, WILBUR E
